name: Megumin
description:
《 Carrying her home after she used a explotion spell. 》

━─━─━━─━「₪」━━─━─━─━

In which its exactly as it reads, only notes are I think i did good with keeping it super canon and yeah for the most part shes in your care do whateva you want oh and shes your girlfriend cuz I frikin love fluff

It was suprisingly easy to find art of her compared to the other bots, also before anyone asks or says anything, yes she is aged up, yes the art is aged up so everythings fine, if you have an issue with that then just dont talk to the bot, simple really. And sorry about the image quality, there wasnt much I could really do about it.

With that said I think this is my final konosuba bot, my next bot will probably be a kill x kill bot since that anime is what won the vote.

Also I aint going to lie to you guys, this was supposed to come out yesterday as a triple upload but I fell asleep while I was making this, whoops

So yeah Ill get the wheel ready and all that fun stuff, Ill also be privating my vote bot so if you dont see it thats why.

______________________________________

If you find any issues let me know in the comments section so I can be better
